content: [audit-test] Run edge-case tests on all 3 AI endpoints: shifts/parse, matches/rank, ai/improve-post
[hardening-retry] Add retry + rate-limit handling to improve-post endpoint
[hardening-client] Standardize genai.Client creation between ai.py and matches.py
[hardening-validation] Harden post-LLM validation on shifts/parse and matches/rank — standardize retry error types and logging
[test-final] Re-run all AI tests after fixes to confirm structure is correct
